languages.text: "Лишь из-за доброй схватки, что мы прошли плечо к плечу, я не сочту это дерзким вызовом, смертный! Цени милость, оказанную тебе Ульфаром!"

traits.locale_text: "Лишь из-за доброй схватки, что мы прошли плечо к плечу, я не сочту это дерзким вызовом, смертный! Цени милость, оказанную тебе Ульфаром!"
traits.speaker: UlfarCompanion

languages.text: "It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"
languages.original_text: "Лишь из-за доброй схватки, что мы прошли плечо к плечу, я не сочту это дерзким вызовом, смертный! Цени милость, оказанную тебе Ульфаром!"

traits.locale_text: "It is only because of the good fight we fought shoulder to shoulder that I will not take this as a insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"
"It is only because of the good fight we fought shoulder to shoulder that I will not take this as a insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"
"It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"
"It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"
"It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"

languages.text: «Si no fuera por la batalla en la que luchamos codo con codo, ¡me tomaría esto como un desafío insolente, mortal! ¡Da gracias a que hoy tengo el día compasivo!».
languages.original_text: "It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"

traits.locale_text: «Si no fuera por la batalla en la que luchamos codo con codo, ¡me tomaría esto como un desafío insolente, mortal! ¡Da gracias a que hoy tengo el día compasivo!».

languages.text: “因为你我在酣战中并肩血战，我才不会将你们的这番话当作妄自尊大的挑衅！好好珍惜乌尔法赐予你们的这份仁慈吧，凡人！”
languages.original_text: "It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"

traits.locale_text: “因为你我在酣战中并肩血战，我才不会将你们的这番话当作妄自尊大的挑衅！好好珍惜乌尔法赐予你们的这份仁慈吧，凡人！”

languages.text: « Comme nous avons livré un beau combat côte à côte, je suis prêt à laisser passer cette provocation insolente, mortel. Chérissez la miséricorde que vous a octroyée Ulfar ! »
languages.original_text: "It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"

traits.locale_text: « Comme nous avons livré un beau combat côte à côte, je suis prêt à laisser passer cette provocation insolente, mortel. Chérissez la miséricorde que vous a octroyée Ulfar ! »

languages.text: "Bunu küstahça bir meydan okuma olarak algılamamamın tek nedeni, omuz omuza verdiğimiz iyi savaştır ölümlü! Ulfar'ın sana bahşettiği merhametin kıymetini bil!"
languages.original_text: "It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"

traits.locale_text: "Bunu küstahça bir meydan okuma olarak algılamamamın tek nedeni, omuz omuza verdiğimiz iyi savaştır ölümlü! Ulfar'ın sana bahşettiği merhametin kıymetini bil!"

languages.text: "Ich betrachte das nur wegen des guten Kampfes, in dem wir Schulter an Schulter gekämpft haben, nicht als unverschämte Herausforderung, {mf|Sterblicher|Sterbliche}. Schätzt die Gnade, die Euch Ulfar erwiesen hat!"
languages.original_text: "It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich betrachte das nur wegen des guten Kampfes, in dem wir Schulter an Schulter gekämpft haben, nicht als unverschämte Herausforderung, {mf|Sterblicher|Sterbliche}. Schätzt die Gnade, die Euch Ulfar erwiesen hat!"

languages.text: 「我々は肩を並べて善戦したからこそ、この挑発を侮辱と受け取らない。ウルファルの慈悲を大切にせよ！」
languages.original_text: "It is only because of the good fight in which we fought shoulder-to-shoulder that I will not take this as an insolent challenge, mortal! Treasure the mercy Ulfar has granted you!"

traits.locale_text: 「我々は肩を並べて善戦したからこそ、この挑発を侮辱と受け取らない。ウルファルの慈悲を大切にせよ！」
